title: Device Forensics: FortiGate — Live CLI
description: FGT-PERIM-02 is still up. Connect to the device, run real FortiOS commands — `show system admin`, `show full-configuration`, `execute log display` — and reconstruct exactly how the attacker got in and what they changed.

hints.text: `connect fgt-perim-02`, any user/password. Start with `show system admin` and compare against ~/approved-admins.txt.
The HTTPS admin access log is exposed for this exercise as `show admin-https-log` — pipe it with `| include Forwarded`.
FortiOS pipes: `show full-configuration | section vpn ssl web portal`, `show full-configuration | section firewall address`.
